creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237768
multimedia/smpeg update to 0.4.5

smpeg now has a release 0.4.5 available, along with a new homepage

The attached diff would contribute the following updates for multimedia/smpeg:
- Updating WWW to reflect the new homepage
- Using GitHub for dist src, with the GitHub project referred from the new homepage
- Removing patch files that have been integrated into the upstream src
- Updating plist for the updated soname

Tested at runtime (FreeBSD 13.1 amd64) using games/epiphany-game
